ignore_for_now.promote_when: Promote once reporting artifacts become required validator or ledger inputs for decision gating.
ignore_for_now.reason_safe_to_defer: Operational and deterministic; current gap is downstream consumption contract, not immediate execution correctness.

ignore_for_now.promote_when: Promote when detector outputs are used as hard decision gates rather than advisory labels.
ignore_for_now.reason_safe_to_defer: Deterministic triage value exists; biggest risk is upstream evidence quality, already addressed by must-finish pipeline/binding items.

ignore_for_now.promote_when: Promote after binding + pipeline closure surfaces stabilize and synthesis is promoted to blocking governance signal.
ignore_for_now.reason_safe_to_defer: Downstream of detector/pipeline closure; improving upstream closures yields higher leverage first.

ignore_for_now.promote_when: Promote when ERS outputs are required to auto-advance runtime corridor or policy enforcement.
ignore_for_now.reason_safe_to_defer: Governance/ERS remains functional and manually controlled; automated consumption can wait until core linkage closes.

ignore_for_now.promote_when: Promote when visual outputs are used as primary operator evidence for closure decisions.
ignore_for_now.reason_safe_to_defer: Known scaffolded orientation layer; low closure leverage versus core lineage/runtime surfaces.

must_finish.expected_impact_if_fixed: Stabilizes run lineage, improves validator traceability, and reduces false closure states.
must_finish.missing_closure_element: Uniform linkage completeness across binding/context artifacts instead of selective repair behavior.
must_finish.smallest_possible_fix: Require non-empty linkage propagation gate in binding/context artifact writers; fail to NOT_COMPUTABLE when linkage prerequisites missing.
must_finish.why_it_matters: Lineage integrity gate for validator trust and downstream synthesis reliability.

must_finish.expected_impact_if_fixed: Raises reliability of pipeline outputs and lowers synthetic-signal leakage.
must_finish.missing_closure_element: Callable map stage + populated ledger/correlation linkage in pipeline envelope.
must_finish.smallest_possible_fix: Replace map projection fallback with callable-check gate; keep step NOT_COMPUTABLE unless callable map output exists and is linked.
must_finish.why_it_matters: Primary execution spine; weak mapping/linkage propagates uncertainty everywhere.

must_finish.expected_impact_if_fixed: Improves predictability of operator actions and runtime state interpretation.
must_finish.missing_closure_element: Removal of MVP fallback path or explicit promotion criteria for core bridge binding.
must_finish.smallest_possible_fix: Promote one authoritative invocation path by forcing explicit external-core availability status in runtime corridor packet.
must_finish.why_it_matters: High-touch operator path; fallback ambiguity can mislead runtime confidence.

must_finish.expected_impact_if_fixed: Makes final-state labels trustworthy and audit-grade.
must_finish.missing_closure_element: Final-state confidence binding to non-projection parse/map evidence.
must_finish.smallest_possible_fix: Gate final-state confidence to upstream parse/map evidence quality and tag synthetic-only paths as PARTIAL.
must_finish.why_it_matters: Produces closure labels that can look stronger than evidence quality.

must_finish.expected_impact_if_fixed: Restores single-source contract authority for rune identity.
must_finish.missing_closure_element: Registry alignment for emitted rune_ids (or explicit deprecation path).
must_finish.smallest_possible_fix: Align emitted rune_id values with catalog entries or mark non-catalog IDs explicitly deprecated in artifact metadata.
must_finish.why_it_matters: Registry drift creates contract confusion and governance entropy.

consistency_checks.note: Each subsystem appears in at most one bucket.

ranked_extracted_subsystems.missing_closure_element: Uniform linkage completeness across binding/context artifacts instead of selective repair behavior.
ranked_extracted_subsystems.rank_rationale: Highest lineage/dependency unlock across validator-facing surfaces.
ranked_extracted_subsystems.user_impact: Some runs restore context, but lineage consistency is not guaranteed across surfaces.

ranked_extracted_subsystems.missing_closure_element: Callable map stage + populated ledger/correlation linkage in pipeline envelope.
ranked_extracted_subsystems.rank_rationale: High dependency execution spine with synthetic risk and frequent use.
ranked_extracted_subsystems.user_impact: Pipeline status appears complete while lineage and semantic mapping remain weak.

ranked_extracted_subsystems.missing_closure_element: Removal of MVP fallback path or explicit promotion criteria for core bridge binding.
ranked_extracted_subsystems.rank_rationale: High-frequency operator path with fallback ambiguity.
ranked_extracted_subsystems.user_impact: Unsupported runtime paths collapse to fallback semantics, reducing predictability of edge behavior.

ranked_extracted_subsystems.missing_closure_element: Final-state confidence binding to non-projection parse/map evidence.
ranked_extracted_subsystems.rank_rationale: Closure label quality depends on upstream evidence integrity.
ranked_extracted_subsystems.user_impact: Review surfaces can look closure-grade when upstream evidence is synthetic.

ranked_extracted_subsystems.missing_closure_element: Registry alignment for emitted rune_ids (or explicit deprecation path).
ranked_extracted_subsystems.rank_rationale: Contract drift creates cross-surface governance confusion.
ranked_extracted_subsystems.user_impact: Governance and validator surfaces cannot treat rune identity as single-source-of-truth.

rules.extraction: include CLOSURE_INCOMPLETE; include PARTIAL only when high-impact; include DEPRECATED/DRIFTING when entropy-producing
rules.ranking: user_impact -> dependency impact -> likely use frequency -> misleading completeness risk -> smallest fix to highest value ratio
rules.scope: no new subsystem ideas, no redesign, source-audit-only

what_it_unblocks: Cleaner governance and ERS consumption paths
single_next_closure_target.why_others_wait: Other high-impact items depend on linkage integrity or become safer to tune once run-linkage consistency is stable.
single_next_closure_target.why_this_unlocks_most_value: It sits at the lineage junction between artifacts, validators, and downstream synthesis confidence.

validation.source_truth_assertion: Derived only from 20260329T210547Z incompleteness audit artifacts.
